iti80:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti80:2.1: “Monks, there are these three kinds of unskillful thinking.
iti80:2.4: There are three kinds of unskillful thinking.”
iti80:3.1: Fettered to not wanting to be despised;
iti80:3.4: you’re far from the ending of fetters.
iti80:4.1: But whoever here, having abandoned sons, cattle,
